ZhHans: 以寿元为火，以五行为刃。
五行灵根构筑，决定你这一局能走多远。
En: Build around elemental roots and decide how far this run can go.

ZhHans: 自动战斗，策略重心放在配装、路线与功法取舍。
En: Auto battles keep the focus on loadouts

ZhHans: 寿元会随着推进不断流逝，每一步都在逼近终局。
进入主菜单后可继续推进地图、战斗与构筑。
En: Enter the main menu to continue your route

ZhHans: 第一阶段 / 第一步 / 文字与线框 UGUI
En: Phase 1 / Step 1 / Text and line UGUI

ZhHans: 这一版先只用文字、线条和矩形框，方便后续替换美术。
En: This version uses text lines and rectangles first so art can be replaced later.

ZhHans: 战斗配置缺失，请先导入全部 CSV。
En: Battle config missing. Import all CSV files first.

ZhHans: 角色甲  HP 120/120角色乙  HP 150/150
敌人甲  HP 100/100敌人乙  HP 90/90
下一步这里会接真实战斗日志。
En: This area will show real battle logs in the next step.

ZhHans: 这是第一阶段的 UGUI 框架，后面可以把这些线框替换成正式美术。
En: This popup is part of the first-phase UGUI framework. These boxes can be replaced by final art later.

ZhHans: 下一步会接入真正的战斗系统。
En: The real battle system will be connected next.

ZhHans: 该功能仅在Unity编辑器中可用。
En: This feature is only available in the Unity Editor.
Lifespan exhausted. The run has ended.

ZhHans: 本轮路线完成，返回主菜单。
En: Route complete. Returning to main menu.

ZhHans: 建议：如果预估不理想，先调整装备再开战。
En: Tip: Adjust equipment before battle if the preview looks risky.
The destination event has been triggered.

ZhHans: 选择你在此地如何调整状态。
En: Choose how to spend this stop.

ZhHans: 借阅藏经获得 1 次功法机缘
离开新手村前，选择一份启程助力。
En: Before leaving the village, choose one piece of support.

ZhHans: 你在附近采集五行灵石，囊中收获更丰。
En: You gather the local five-element crystals and leave with fuller pockets.

ZhHans: 你手中的对应灵石不足，暂时无法进行这次炼化。
En: You do not have enough matching spirit stones to refine this stop.

ZhHans: 你将储备灵石当场炼化，强行换来一段更猛的修为推进。
En: You refine stored spirit stones into pure progress and push your cultivation further.

ZhHans: 你整理装备与气机，为下一段路做足准备。
En: You sort equipment and steady your rhythm before moving on.

ZhHans: 你专心调息运转周天，修为更进一步。
En: You focus on breathing practice and deepen your cultivation.

ZhHans: 路过行商给你留下一份赶路所需的修行补给。
En: A passing merchant leaves you a small bundle of cultivation supplies.

ZhHans: 临行前，村中长者给了你几句修行指点。
En: The village elder gives you a few words of guidance before you set out.

ZhHans: 选择一项开局功法机缘。
你整理思绪后，轻装上路。
En: You leave the village with a clearer mind.

ZhHans: 你从村中藏经阁借得一页功法残卷。
En: You borrow a manual from the village archive.

ZhHans: 你在本轮途中寿元耗尽。当前局将结束，并返回主界面。
En: Your lifespan has run out during this journey. The current run will end and return to the main menu.

ZhHans: 立刻触发休整事件，并停留在地图上。
En: Trigger rest immediately and stay on the map.

ZhHans: 移动结束后自动进入战斗。
En: Start battle automatically after movement ends.

ZhHans: 你可以在这里拿灵石换资源，或稳稳补一轮状态。
En: Trade spirit stones for resources here

ZhHans: 你用手头灵石换来一件趁手法器，顺便稳住了一截修为。
En: You trade your spirit stones for a fitting relic and stabilize your cultivation a bit.

ZhHans: 你补足了路上的必需品，推进节奏重新平顺下来。
En: You restock what you need for the road and smooth out your run tempo.

ZhHans: 从摊位上的几页残卷里挑一份带走。
En: Choose one manual from the incomplete pages on the stall.

ZhHans: 你从集市摊位上换来一页残卷。
En: You trade for a torn manual page from the market stall.

ZhHans: 你翻遍摊位，却没有遇到合适的机缘。
首领战前的最后一站，你可以换一轮更激进的成长。
En: This is your last stop before the boss

ZhHans: 你以灵石强行凝练道基，换来一段更扎实的修为突破。
En: You force your foundation tighter with spirit stones and secure a sharper cultivation jump.

ZhHans: 你开启静室遗藏，补到一份装备机缘与临战储备。
En: You open the sanctum cache and come away with gear and a bit of battle stock.

ZhHans: 从这一次顿悟里定下一门最终要诀。
En: Choose the technique that crystallizes from this moment of insight.

ZhHans: 你在静室闭关片刻，抓住了一线更高阶的功法机缘。
En: A brief retreat inside the sanctum reveals a higher-tier skill opportunity.

ZhHans: 这一次闭关没有新的感悟，只留下片刻清明。
En: This retreat brings no new revelation

ZhHans: 获得 1 次高阶功法机缘
获得 1 次顶阶功法机缘
此处只提供整备，不直接赠送资源。你可以随时整理当前装备。
En: This stop offers preparation only. You can reorganize your equipment here without gaining direct rewards.

ZhHans: 此处只供温习功法，不直接赠送资源。你可以查看当前已学功法。
En: This stop is for reviewing skills only. You can inspect learned techniques here without gaining direct rewards.

ZhHans: 此处是固定路标点，用来确认前路与节奏，不直接产出奖励。
En: This fixed waypoint helps you review the route and pacing. It does not grant direct rewards.

ZhHans: 此地会随机触发一段机缘，触发后需等待冷却恢复。
En: A random opportunity may trigger here and must recover after its cooldown.

ZhHans: 这里专做灵石与机缘的交换，适合把库存资源转成即时战力。
En: A broker stop for turning stored spirit stones into immediate power.

ZhHans: 你把一批灵石低价炼化，换来一截扎实的修为增长。
En: You refine a batch of stones at a discount and turn it into steady cultivation growth.

ZhHans: 你从牙行收来一份旧藏，顺手补到一轮装备与路资。
En: You acquire a hidden cache from the broker and round out your gear and travel stock.

ZhHans: 从这批流转而来的残卷里挑一份带走。
En: Choose one manual from the circulating fragments.

ZhHans: 你从牙行竞下了一份更高阶的功法残卷。
En: You win a higher-tier skill fragment from the broker.

ZhHans: 这批残卷都不合眼缘，没有换到想要的机缘。
En: None of the broker manuals fit your build this time.

ZhHans: 这里更像一次冲刺抉择，你可以用现有资源换一轮更激进的成长。
En: A sprint-focused stop where you trade current resources for a more aggressive power spike.

ZhHans: 你借熔炉之力强行淬体，换来一段更激进的成长。
En: You force a body-tempering session through the forge and gain a sharper growth spike.

ZhHans: 你打开炉中旧藏，补到一份装备机缘与临战资源。
En: You open the forge cache and gain gear opportunity plus battle stock.

ZhHans: 从熔炉异象里定下一门更高阶的法诀。
En: Choose the stronger technique revealed by the forge omen.

ZhHans: 你在熔炉异象中抓住了一门顶阶功法机缘。
En: You seize a top-tier skill opportunity from the forge omen.

ZhHans: 这次熔炉异象没有留下新的法诀。
En: This forge omen leaves no new technique behind.

ZhHans: 当前无法读取功法数据。
下一步：回到地图，准备前往第 {0} 关。
En: Next: Return to the map and prepare for Stage {0}.

ZhHans: 下一步：回到地图，从第 {0} 关重新整备。
En: Next: Return to the map and regroup from Stage {0}.

ZhHans: 从第 1 关开始新一轮
En: Start a new run from Stage 1

ZhHans: 从第 1 关开始新一轮试炼。
En: Start a new run from Stage 1.

ZhHans: 先完成或反复整备第 {0} 关，再决定是否继续前进。
En: Clear or prepare around Stage {0} before moving on.

ZhHans: 标准战斗节点，可获得修为、灵石与装备掉落。
En: Standard battle node with cultivation, spirit stones, and equipment rewards.

ZhHans: 精英战斗节点，敌人更强，但奖励品质更高。
En: Elite battle node with stronger enemies and better rewards.

ZhHans: 休整节点，用来调整资源、节奏与临战状态。
En: Rest node for adjusting resources, pacing, and battle readiness.

ZhHans: 首领战节点，胜利后可推进当前章节。
En: Boss battle node. Victory advances the current chapter.

ZhHans: 你顺着流转的机缘收拢气运，换来一段平稳的修为与灵石增长。
En: You ride the passing fortune into a steady gain of cultivation and spirit stones.

ZhHans: 你在沿途残痕里翻出一份旧藏，顺手补到装备与些许路资。
En: You uncover a forgotten cache along the road and come away with gear plus a little stock.

ZhHans: 你抓住转瞬即逝的一线灵感，凝成一次更高阶的功法机缘。
En: You seize a fleeting flash of insight and turn it into a higher-tier skill opportunity.

ZhHans: 这次机缘来得快去得也快，没有留下新的法门。
En: This opportunity fades quickly and leaves no new technique behind.

ZhHans: 这处随机机缘刚刚触发过，还需要再等待 {0} 个月才会恢复。
En: This random opportunity was triggered recently. It will recover in {0} month(s).

ZhHans: 按五行相生，将一种灵石炼化为下一相灵石。
En: Refine one spirit stone into the next generating element.

ZhHans: 点击任意一系灵石，按相生规则进行转换。
En: Select any spirit stone and convert it along the generating cycle.

ZhHans: 当前灵石不足，无法完成本次转换。
En: Not enough spirit stones for this conversion.

ZhHans: 接下来 {0} 个月，额外获得经验 +{1}。
En: For the next {0} month(s), gain +{1} extra exp.

ZhHans: 接下来 {0} 个月，额外获得灵石 +{1}。
En: For the next {0} month(s), gain +{1} extra spirit stones.
